name: github-clone-in-vscode
description: A simple Chrome extension that adds a 'Clone in VS Code' button to GitHub repositories for seamless one-click cloning.

scripts.build: npm run bundle && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs && cp popup.html popup.css dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r "../github-clone-in-vscode-v$npm_package_version.zip" .

author: AdamAkhlaq
